history.title: Download History
history.subtitle: All your downloaded files from GitHub repository
history.emptyHint: Start a new download from the home page
history.setupRequiredHint: Please configure your GitHub token first

merge.cliDesc: Download all parts and merge them with terminal commands:
merge.uiDesc: Follow these steps to merge your downloaded parts:
merge.uiStep1: Download all parts listed above to the same folder
merge.uiStep2: Go to the Merge page from the home page
merge.uiStep3: Drop all parts into the merge tool and click Merge

setup.title: Setup
setup.description: Initialize your GitHub repository with required workflows
setup.cookiesDescription: Paste your cookies.txt content for age-restricted videos
setup.cookiesUpdate: Update your cookies.txt (expired cookies can cause download failures)

jobStatus.title: Job Status
jobStatus.failedMessage: Job failed. Check logs for details.

step1.title: Welcome to Mown
step1.description: Mown helps you download any file from the internet using GitHub Actions. No server or technical tools needed.
step1.feature1: Download videos from YouTube with quality options
step1.feature4: Mirror complete websites for offline use
step1.feature5: All files are stored in your GitHub repository

step2.title: GitHub Token
step2.description: Mown needs a personal GitHub token to run jobs. This token is only stored in your browser.
step2.step3: Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens → Tokens (classic)
step2.tokenHint: Your token is stored locally and never sent to any server

step3.title: Setup Repository
step3.description: Mown needs a GitHub repository to run downloads. Select an existing repo or create a new one automatically.
step3.skipSetup: I already have a repo, skip

step4.title: You're All Set!
step4.description: Everything is ready. You can now start your first download.
step4.tip1Desc: Copy any video or file URL and paste it in the main input
step4.tip2Desc: Set quality, format and filename as needed
step4.tip3Desc: View all downloads in History with status and download links

merge.title: Merge Parts
merge.description: Select the zip files you downloaded in parts to merge them back together.
merge.dropzone: Click to select files or drop them here
